contract_claim: L40: parameter `ExplorationExecutor.__init__.max_list_entries` — None of the 16 call sites pass `max_list_entries`. The production call site (triage.py:172) uses `ExplorationExecutor(config)` with no optional args, and all 14 test call sites either pass no optional args or pass only `max_file_bytes` or `max_grep_matches`. The parameter always takes its default value of 200.
observed_behavior: Consider hardcoding 200 as a module-level constant (e.g. `_MAX_LIST_ENTRIES = 200`) and removing the constructor parameter, or leave it as a tunable but document that no caller currently overrides it. No conditional branches are exclusively gated by this parameter — `self.max_list_entries` is used as a loop cap threshold that always runs, not as a guard for an optional code path.
